_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: fujitatomoya
data.message:
remove uncrustify errors against rolling build. (#84)

Signed-off-by: Tomoya Fujita <Tomoya.Fujita@sony.com>

data.author: ivanpauno
data.message:
Fix bug in generic subscription (#27)

Signed-off-by: Ivan Santiago Paunovic <ivanpauno@ekumenlabs.com>

data.author: aprotyas
data.message:
Fix API docs link (#67)

Since rosdoc2 generated API docs are now hosted online, the link in the
README can point to the appropriate resource.

Signed-off-by: Abrar Rahman Protyasha <aprotyas@u.rochester.edu>

data.author: rebecca-butler
data.message:
Refactor to use generic pub/sub from rclcpp (#30)

* Refactor to use generic pub/sub from rclcpp

Signed-off-by: Rebecca Butler <rebecca@openrobotics.org>

* Remove unnecessary add_publisher and add_subscription calls

Signed-off-by: Rebecca Butler <rebecca@openrobotics.org>

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Override handle_serialized_message. (#21)

* Override handle_serialized_message.

This should allow it to build against rolling again.

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@openrobotics.org>

* Remove the override flag with a note explaining why.

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@openrobotics.org>

data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Add explicit link against stdc++fs (#16)

It is not necessary with GCC 9, but stdc++fs isn't
part of libstdc++ prior to that.

See note at the bottom of: https://en.cppreference.com/w/cpp/filesystem

Signed-off-by: Scott K Logan <logans@cottsay.net>
